category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Sui as a smart contract platform powered by Move; official Sui docs describe it as a next-generation smart contract platform.

docs_sources: Official Sui documentation domain lists guides, references, tutorials, Sui CLI, and API docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/MystenLabs/sui; per instruction not re-evaluated.
